# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 731. Assembled Vehicles
##### § 731.053 — Certificate of Title Requirements

(a) The title for an assembled vehicle that has never been titled in this state or any other jurisdiction must:

    (1) list the owner of the assembled vehicle as the purchaser;

    (2) contain the notation “NONE” in the space for the seller’s name;

    (3) list the municipality and state in which the vehicle was completed in the space for the seller’s municipality and state; and

    (4) contain the odometer reading and the notation “NOT ACTUAL MILEAGE”.

(b) Except as provided by Subsection (a), a title issued for an assembled vehicle must contain all of the information required under Section 501.021 (Title for Motor Vehicle) .

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The title for an assembled vehicle that has never been titled in this state or any other jurisdiction must:
list the owner of the assembled vehicle as the purchaser;
contain the notation “NONE” in the space for the seller’s name;
list the municipality and state in which the vehicle was completed in the space for the seller’s municipality and state; and
contain the odometer reading and the notation “NOT ACTUAL MILEAGE”.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (a), a title issued for an assembled vehicle must contain all of the information required under Section 501.021 (Title for Motor Vehicle) .
